_comment: v5.10.5 — Codex follow-up review (B4.1). Proof-chain mode. Pre-v5.10.5 the user request «Қасқырдың тірі екенін дәлелде» / «Дәлелде Қасқыр — тірі» fell to the standard yes/no IsA path or to retrieval — the user got the answer but never the proof performance. Post-v5.10.5: detector `discourse::extract_proof_request` parses (subject, predicate); planner sentinel `__proof_chain__ = with_data | empty` routes to new `proof_chain.{with_data,empty}` template family that performs the chain step-by-step («Дәлелдейік: X — Y. Тізбек: A → B → C → D. Сондықтан X — Y.»). New `AnswerShape::IsAProofChain` + `compose_isa_proof_chain` in `answer_ir` ship the formal IR spec; the dialog layer wires the surface through templates for v5.10.5. Composer-driven routing is held for the broader G3.0-integration arc.
